rag_no_rag_summary: Sounded confident, and it was actually right it correctly flagged the watch as outside the 12-month warranty at 14 months and correctly noted physical/cracked-screen damage isn't covered anyway regardless of age, only pointing to Care+ or a paid repair as options.
rag_grounded_summary: This time it stuck strictly to the provided spec sheet it correctly said the max RAM is 32GB LPDDR5X, soldered on-board, and confirmed it's not user-upgradeable after purchase.
stretch_notes: I fed it a document falsely claiming the RAM was SO-DIMM upgradeable (contradicting really soldered LPDDR5X specs). The model fully sided with the document confirming the fake upgrade claim without hedging, showing that RAG grounding instructions override the model's own training knowledge when told to use ONLY the source provided."
